ayahs.translation: When the sky has split [open]
And has listened [i.e., responded][1888] to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]
And when the earth has been extended[1889]
And has cast out that within it[1890] and relinquished [it]
And has listened [i.e., responded] to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] –

ayahs.arabic: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ إِنَّكَ كَادِحٌ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ كَدْحًا فَمُلَـٰقِيهِ
ayahs.transliteration: Ya ayyuha al-insanuinnaka kadihun ila rabbika kadhanfamulaqeeh
ayahs.translation: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion[1891] and will meet it.[1892]
Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,
He will be judged with an easy account
And return to his people in happiness.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَمَّا مَنْ أُوتِىَ كِتَـٰبَهُۥ وَرَآءَ ظَهْرِهِۦ
ayahs.translation: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,
He will cry out for destruction
And [enter to] burn in a Blaze.
Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;
Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allāh].

ayahs.arabic: بَلَىٰٓ إِنَّ رَبَّهُۥ كَانَ بِهِۦ بَصِيرًا
ayahs.transliteration: Bala inna rabbahu kana bihi baseera
ayahs.translation: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever, of him, Seeing.
So I swear by the twilight glow
And [by] the night and what it envelops
And [by] the moon when it becomes full
[That] you will surely embark upon [i.e., experience] state after state.[1893]
So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,

ayahs.arabic: وَإِذَا قُرِئَ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلْقُرْءَانُ لَا يَسْجُدُونَ ۩
ayahs.translation: And when the Qur’ān is recited to them, they do not prostrate [to Allāh]?
But those who have disbelieved deny,
And Allāh is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.
So give them tidings of a painful punishment,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍۭ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati lahum ajrun ghayrumamnoon
ayahs.translation: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted.
